zh.lifeSummary: 當Suvardus De Arden於大約1095年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，他的父親Turchill Warwick28歲，母親Levecunia de Ardena24歲。他和Mrs. Suvardus De Arden至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1148年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Suvardus De Arden于大约1095年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲Turchill Warwick28岁，母亲Levecunia de Ardena24岁。他和Mrs. Suvardus De Arden至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1148年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Arden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, either from the district of Arden in Warwickshire or from Arden in Bredbury (Cheshire). The first placename is thought to be derived from a Celtic word meaning ‘high place’, cognate with Ardennes, the name of a forested region on the borders between northeastern France and eastern Belgium. The second derives from Old English hēah ‘high’ + worthign ‘enclosed settlement’.

variants.name: Harden
meanings: English: variant of Arden with prosthetic H-.

English: habitational name, either from Haredene Wood in East Tisbury (Wiltshire), or from Haredon (in Ugborough, Devon). The first placename probably derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ + denu ‘valley’. The second is from Old English hara + dūn ‘hare hill’.

en.lifeSummary: When Suvardus De Arden was born about 1095, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Turchill Warwick, was 28 and his mother, Levecunia de Ardena, was 24. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Mrs. Suvardus De Arden. He died after 1148, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Suvardus De Arden est né environ 1095, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Turchill Warwick, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Levecunia de Ardena, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs. Suvardus De Arden. Il est décédé après 1148, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Suvardus De Arden um 1095 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Turchill Warwick 28 und seine Mutter Levecunia de Ardena 24. Er hatte mit Mrs. Suvardus De Arden mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1148 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Suvardus De Arden è nato il circa 1095 nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Turchill Warwick, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Levecunia de Ardena, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Mrs. Suvardus De Arden. Morì dopo il 1148, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Suvardus De Ardenが約1095年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Turchill Warwickは28歳，母Levecunia de Ardenaは24歳であった。彼はMrs. Suvardus De Ardenとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1148年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Suvardus De Arden(이)가 대략 1095년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Turchill Warwick(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Levecunia de Ardena(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Mrs. Suvardus De Arden(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1148년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Suvardus De Arden nasceu aproximadamente 1095, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Turchill Warwick, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Levecunia de Ardena, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Mrs. Suvardus De Arden. Ele faleceu após 1148, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Suvardus De Arden родился около 1095 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Turchill Warwick было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Levecunia de Ardena, 24. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Mrs. Suvardus De Arden. Он умер после 1148 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Suvardus De Arden nació aproximadamente 1095, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Turchill Warwick, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Levecunia de Ardena, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Mrs. Suvardus De Arden. Murió después de 1148, en su pueblo.
